summary: Iteration 8 testing complete - All 11 backend tests passed, frontend UI tests passed. Features verified: salary deductions (غياب/تأخر/إجازة بدون مرتب), individual salary eye icon toggle, search by employee number, PDF export fixed, permissions restructured (hr_management in الموارد البشرية group), sidebar shows 'الفواتير والعهدة'. Admin sidebar projects correctly go to /reports.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/hr/salaries correctly accepts deduction_type and deduction_amount fields
GET /api/hr/salaries returns deduction_type and deduction_amount in response
Deduction types supported: غياب, تأخر, إجازة بدون مرتب
Salary table shows columns: الخصومات (red if > 0), الإجمالي (blue, gross), الصافي (green, net)
Salary modal has deduction dropdown that shows amount input when type selected
Individual salary eye icon toggle works per person (isSalaryHidden checks hiddenSalaries state first)
Search input searches by name AND employee_number (filterData function updated)
PDF export fixed - autoTable now called correctly with (doc, options) pattern
GET /api/permissions shows hr_management in 'الموارد البشرية' group
GET /api/permissions shows 'الفواتير والعهدة' label for invoices
GET /api/permissions shows 'اعتماد من المدير المباشر' for review_invoices
Admin sidebar projects go to /reports (userHasConnectionPerms=false for admin)
seed_data_creation: Test salaries/employees/contracts created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 features fully tested. HRSalary model has deduction_type (optional str) and deduction_amount (float, default 0). Salary table shows deductions column with red text if > 0, gross in blue, net in green. Individual eye icon toggle uses isSalaryHidden() which checks hiddenSalaries state first. Search by employee_number works. PDF export uses autoTable(doc, options) pattern. Permissions restructured: hr_management in 'الموارد البشرية' group, invoices label is 'الفواتير والعهدة', review_invoices label is 'اعتماد من المدير المباشر'. Admin sidebar projects go to /reports not connections-hub.
